shortForecast: Smoke then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Smoke and showers and thunderstorms likely before 9pm, then areas of smoke and showers and thunderstorms likely between 9pm and midnight, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between midnight and 3am. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 67. Southwest wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
